case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. ARMEN POSTOYAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR HIS CASE TODAY, THEN PLAINTIFF DECIDED TO DISMISS THE CASE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSON. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED AUG-09-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT POSTOYAN, ARMEN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $525.76 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT POSTOYAN, ARMEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
